holdings.n: Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund

holdings.infoBox: FMED is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund stock at 12.38%, LifeStance Health Group at 4.68%, 10x Genomics at 3.36%, UCB SA at 3.33%, and Danaher at 3.33%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Disruptive Medicine ETF (FMED) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in companies involved in disruptive innovation in Health Care. The fund invests in securities of domestic and foreign issuers FMED was launched on Apr 16, 2020 and is issued by Fidelity.
